dealSummary: Moonshot AI, a China-based chatbot developer, is looking to raise up to $2 billion in a round that would give the startup a $30 billion valuation, Bloomberg reported.
SunUp Fusion, a China-based nuclear fusion specialist, raised a $100 million round led by an investor group including Qiming Venture Partners, Deal Street Asia reported.
leadInvestors: an investor group including Qiming Venture Partners, Deal Street Asia reported

dealSummary: PointFive, the developer of an AI cost-management platform, secured a $60 million Series B led by Accel.
Edge Markets, which provides a banking platform for betting and crypto, raised a $29.2 million Series A led by CoinFund.
NewOrbit, a UK satellite maker, raised an $18.5 million Series A led by Voyager Ventures.
Galvany, the Berlin-based developer of a heat pump platform, secured a €10 million seed round co-led by SET Ventures and AENU.
